439 M1030_ARTRL_ULCR_NUM M1030_ARTRL_ULCR_NUM M1030 Venous and Arterial Ulcer Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of venous or arterial ulcers present. 0 Minimum

440 M1040A_FT_INFCTN_CD M1040A_FT_INFCTN_CD M1040A Other Foot Skin Problems: Foot Infection Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has a foot infection (e.g., cellulitis, purulent drainage). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not
